shared_properties: The cloud uses the world palette and sits on top of the #F7F7F7 sky fill.
The cloud is static art while motion comes from runtime scrolling.
The cloud stays monochrome with transparent cutout background.
differences: This is the compact cloud size used as the base silhouette for larger cloud variants.
The silhouette spans 46x14px with three rounded lobes.
The lower edge stays almost flat so the cloud reads cleanly at 1x scale.

context.usage: Optional parallax cloud for depth without obstructing obstacle readability.

shape.silhouette: Compact three-lobe cloud with a nearly flat base line.

acceptance_criteria: The cloud keeps at least 2px of transparent margin on every side except the grounded silhouette edge.
Only #535353 and transparency appear in painted pixels.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_2x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds sky, cloud, and ground strip spacing that defines motion readability.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_1x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds sky, cloud, and ground strip spacing that defines motion readability.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle with a single nearest-neighbor texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and store the handle in a typed resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Snap transforms to whole pixels before render extraction.
Use visibility toggles or spawn pools instead of mutating image handles during active play.
Keep collider setup separate from the art bundle so gameplay forgiveness margins remain tunable.
